title: Vault Sync via InventList
objective: Sync encrypted vaults across devices using InventList as a zero-knowledge backend with PGP-style per-user key slots.

security_model.keypair: Curve25519 (RbNaCl Box). Private key: Keychain (macOS) or ~/.localvault/keys/identity.priv (0600). Public key on InventList profile.
security_model.vault_blob: libsodium XSalsa20-Poly1305 encrypted — already encrypted before upload
security_model.key_slots: Vault master key encrypted per-user with their Curve25519 public key. Prepended header on vault file.
security_model.zero_knowledge: InventList stores encrypted blobs + metadata only. Passphrase and private keys never transmitted.
security_model.revocation: Delete key slot = no new pulls. --rotate flag = re-encrypt master key for full revocation.

storage.db_model: VaultSync: user_id, name, checksum (sha256), size_bytes, synced_at, r2_key
storage.proxy: All R2 access proxied through Rails — CLI talks only to Rails API

stories.title: localvault keygen command
stories.scope: Add keygen CLI command wrapping Identity.generate!
acceptance: localvault keygen generates Curve25519 keypair, prints public key
localvault keygen --force regenerates without error
localvault keygen --show prints public key without regenerating
Running keygen twice without --force prints error and exits non-zero
constraints: Uses existing Identity.generate! — no new crypto code
stories.verify: localvault keygen then localvault keygen --show outputs same base64 key

stories.title: localvault login command
stories.scope: Add login command: validate token via /api/v1/me, store handle, auto-keygen, publish public key
acceptance: localvault login TOKEN validates token, stores it, prints 'Logged in as @handle'
Auto-runs keygen on first login if no keypair exists
Publishes public key to InventList profile on login
localvault logout clears token and handle from config
localvault login --status shows logged-in handle or 'Not logged in'
Invalid token shows clean error (not a stack trace)
constraints: Handle fetched from GET /api/v1/me — user does not need to pass it
login replaces connect for the sync workflow (connect remains for legacy share commands)
stories.verify: localvault login TOKEN then check inventlist.com/@handle shows LocalVault badge

stories.title: InventList API — public key endpoints
acceptance: PUT /api/v1/profile/public_key updates user.public_key, requires Bearer token
GET /api/v1/users/:handle/public_key returns public key or 404
GET /api/v1/me returns handle + profile (used by login to fetch handle)

stories.title: InventList — VaultSync model + R2 bucket
stories.scope: New R2 bucket + VaultSync ActiveRecord model + R2 upload/download service
acceptance: R2 bucket localvault-sync created, credentials in Rails credentials
VaultSync model: user_id, name, checksum, size_bytes, synced_at, r2_key
VaultSync validates: name format, size <= 5MB, unique per user+name
R2Service.upload(key, data) and R2Service.download(key) work in console
constraints: Direct aws-sdk-s3 calls (not ActiveStorage) — no attachment indirection needed
stories.verify: Rails console: upload blob, create VaultSync record, download and compare checksums

stories.title: InventList API — vault push/pull/list endpoints
stories.scope: PUT/GET/GET-list/DELETE endpoints for vault blobs, proxied through Rails to R2
acceptance: PUT /api/v1/vaults/:name — upsert VaultSync + upload blob to R2
GET /api/v1/vaults/:name — stream blob from R2 to client
GET /api/v1/vaults — list all user's vault syncs (name, checksum, size, synced_at)
DELETE /api/v1/vaults/:name — remove from R2 + delete VaultSync record
All require Bearer token auth, 404 on missing vault
constraints: Max blob size 5MB enforced at controller level
Checksum computed server-side and stored in VaultSync
stories.verify: curl PUT binary blob then GET returns identical bytes, checksum matches

stories.title: localvault sync push command
stories.scope: CLI command to upload encrypted vault blob to InventList/R2
acceptance: localvault sync push pushes default vault
localvault sync push -v NAME pushes named vault
Warns if remote checksum is newer: 'Remote is newer. Use --force to overwrite.'
Shows: 'Pushing vault NAME... done (X KB)'
constraints: Vault file already encrypted — push as-is, no re-encryption
Requires active session OR passphrase to read vault file path
stories.verify: Push from Mac 1, verify file appears in R2 bucket

stories.title: localvault sync pull command
stories.scope: CLI command to download encrypted vault blob from InventList/R2
acceptance: localvault sync pull downloads and writes ~/.localvault/vaults/NAME.vault
Warns if local is newer: 'Local is newer. Use --force to overwrite.'
Creates vault directory if it doesn't exist
Shows: 'Pulled vault NAME. Run: localvault show to unlock.'
constraints: Does NOT prompt for passphrase — user unlocks separately after pull
Does NOT overwrite newer local vault without --force
stories.verify: Pull on Mac 2, then localvault show with correct passphrase works

stories.title: localvault sync status command
stories.scope: Show sync state for all vaults: synced/ahead/behind/local-only/remote-only
acceptance: localvault sync status shows table of all vaults with status and last synced time
Compares local vault file sha256 against remote checksum from API
Status values: synced, ahead, behind, local-only, remote-only
constraints: Read-only — no push or pull side effects
stories.verify: Push from Mac 1, check status on Mac 2 shows 'behind'

stories.title: localvault team add command
stories.scope: Add teammate's key slot to shared vault by looking up their public key from InventList profile
acceptance: localvault team add @handle -v NAME adds key slot for handle
Fetches @handle public key from InventList, fails cleanly if not found
Re-encrypts vault with updated key slots, pushes to R2
Shows: 'Added @handle to vault NAME'
constraints: Requires vault to be unlocked (needs master key)
Only existing authorized users can add others
stories.verify: Add teammate, they run sync pull and can unlock vault

stories.title: InventList API — public key lookup by handle
acceptance: Pre-existing endpoint, no changes needed

stories.title: localvault team remove command
stories.scope: Remove teammate key slot, optionally rotate master key for full revocation
acceptance: localvault team remove @handle -v NAME removes their key slot
localvault team list -v NAME shows all authorized users
--rotate flag re-encrypts vault with new master key
Cannot remove self if only authorized user
stories.verify: After remove, sync pull fails for removed user
